description: Take casual dressing to the next level with these strappy sandals from Timbaland. The Roman design of these footwear will look great when teamed up with linen pants and soft cotton shirts for the perfect resortwear look.Upper Strappy leather uppers crisscrossing over the forefoot and big toe acting as a toe separator to give a snug Fit Ankle strap with buckle on the side for securing the foot Midsole Cushioned cork footbed ergonomically designed for all day support and comfort Outsole Green Rubber outsole made of 42% recycled rubber with interwoven pattern for greater grip and traction Wash careUse the appropriate timberland leather shoe polish to keep your shoes cleanDo not use polish over canvas/woven areas
